item.title: I'll look a lot better
item.description: The optimism was there right until reality showed up.

item.title: that'll do it
item.description: One small mistake was all it took to change everything.

media:content.media:title: that'll do it

item.title: smile faded so fast
item.description: The moment confidence disappears in the blink of an eye.

item.title: The table tried to keep it moving, and somehow made it worse.
item.description: When the furniture has ideas of its own and they are all terrible.

item.title: It starts as a simple rating and turns into a whole problem.
item.description: What begins as an innocent opinion quickly creates more drama than expected.

item.title: We gotta laugh through the pain sometimes
item.description: Sometimes the only way to get through the chaos is to find something to laugh about.

media:content.media:description: Sometimes the only way to get through the chaos is to find something to laugh about.

item.title: thoughts on anime?
item.description: A simple question about anime sparks a hilarious and unexpected conversation.

item.title: The laugh they couldn’t hide says everything.
